coverageEstimate: 30-35% of total original game; ~90% of Phase 1A civilized era scope

statusLegend.exact: Implemented and intended to match legacy behavior within current scope.
statusLegend.partial: Implemented in part, but known gaps remain.
statusLegend.intentional_diff: A documented, temporary deviation from legacy behavior.

systems.title: Evolution Tree (Phase 2)
notes: Full branching evolution tree implemented for humanoid route only.
evolveCosts formula (count*mult+base) matches legacy L5669-5672 exactly.
Unlock trigger rules match legacy main.js L1249-1281 exactly.
Auto RNA/DNA generation (organelles+nucleus tick) matches legacy main.js L1220-1238.
Step costs (sexual_reproduction=150, phagocytosis=175, ..., humanoid=260) match legacy.
Race selection costs (320 RNA + 320 DNA) match legacy L5187-5188.
sentience() cleanup (clear evolution + evo_xxx tech) matches legacy L8426-8432.
Not yet implemented: plant/fungi/synthetic/special genus routes (intentional Phase 2 scope).
Not yet implemented: biome-dependent genus availability (eldritch/aquatic/fey/heat/polar/sand require specific biomes).
34 new unit tests fully verify all unlock rules, costs, and the complete evo 0→7→sentience path.

systems.title: Core Tick Loop
notes: Core production and consumption formulas are parity-audited.
Full loop behavior still depends on deterministic replay audits for confidence.
Evolution phase now handled by evolutionTick() in evolution.ts.
ARPA tick now integrated via arpaTick() called at end of gameTick().

systems.title: ARPA Long-term Research (Phase 1A)
notes: costMultiplier formula (mult^rank * base) matches legacy arpa.js L1733-1742 exactly.
Instalment payment (cost/100 per tick) matches legacy arpa.js L1688.
Human creative trait reduces mult by 0.01 — matches legacy arpa.js L1735-1737.
Monument types (Obelisk/Statue/Sculpture/Monolith/Pillar) and costs match legacy arpa.js L1652-1664.
Monument morale cap bonus (+2 per rank) matches legacy arpa.js L172-175.
stock_exchange unlock condition (banking:9) matches legacy arpa.js L81.
Not yet implemented: stock_exchange effect on bank income.
Not yet implemented: launch_facility, railway, supercollider (require Space tech).
Not yet implemented: Genetics/CRISPR/Blood pools (require prestige/reset system).
ARPA tab appears after monument tech research — matches legacy visibility logic.

systems.title: Phase 1 Structures
notes: Phase 1 whitelist is parity-audited.
Later-era and non-whitelisted legacy structures remain unimplemented.

systems.title: Phase 1 Technologies
notes: Implemented techs are checked for grant, costs, and requirements.
Most legacy tech tree content is still outside current scope.

systems.title: Phase 1 Jobs
notes: Current jobs are parity-audited against legacy impact and stress values.

systems.title: Trade
notes: Buy and sell ratios, manual limits, route limits, and auto-trade are covered by tests and parity checks.

systems.title: Morale
notes: Season, weather, unemployment, stress, entertainment, cap, and multiplier formulas are covered.

systems.title: Power Grid
notes: Coal and oil power are implemented and tested.
Fission power (nuclear, +14MW, 0.1 Uranium/tick) implemented.
Later-era power systems (fusion, etc.) are not implemented.

systems.title: Military
notes: Training, mercs, hunting output, and basic campaigns exist.
Legacy spy, annexation, and deeper combat systems are not yet restored.

systems.title: Religion
notes: Faith, theology, theocracy, temple, shrine, and priest output are in place.
The broader legacy religion tree is still missing.

systems.title: Random Events
notes: Current event set is implemented and tested.
Legacy event catalog is much larger than the current subset.

systems.title: Species Traits
notes: Elven (studious/arrogant), Dwarf (artisan/stubborn), Goblin (greedy/merchant): all activeNow=true, parity-audited.
Orc (brute/angry): both activeNow=true; brute affects training rate and merc cost; angry affects hunger production multiplier.
Human (diverse): activeNow=true; slows training rate by 25%.
Human (creative): remains activeNow=false; blocked on ARPA system.
Uranium resource added; coal mines produce trace uranium when uranium tech is researched.

systems.title: Planet Traits
notes: The unstable cost hooks exist in structure data.
The full legacy trait system is not restored yet.

systems.title: ARPA Research
notes: Legacy late-game research systems remain outside the current reconstruction scope.

systems.title: Space And Colony Systems
notes: Moon, Mars, asteroid, gas giant, and related progression are not implemented yet.

systems.title: Resets And Prestige
notes: Bioseed, blackhole, ascend, and other reset paths are not implemented yet.

systems.title: Achievements
notes: Legacy achievement and permanent bonus systems are still missing.

systems.title: Governor AI
notes: Legacy governor automation is not implemented yet.

intentionalDiffs.legacy: Full evolution tree with 50+ branching techs.
intentionalDiffs.evozen: Simplified RNA and DNA collection with direct species choice.
intentionalDiffs.plan: Restore the full evolution tree in a later phase.

intentionalDiffs.evozen: 5 basic species for the current single-player reconstruction scope.
intentionalDiffs.plan: Expand species gradually after core parity is stronger.

intentionalDiffs.evozen: 250 ticks until the long-loop cadence is fully aligned.
intentionalDiffs.plan: Re-align after the loop timing is finalized.

intentionalDiffs.legacy: Multiple fuel options and deeper metallurgy branching.
intentionalDiffs.evozen: Simplified pre-steel and post-steel fuel logic.

intentionalDiffs.legacy: Full military, spy, and annexation systems.
intentionalDiffs.evozen: Basic campaigns with a narrower tactic and foreign-state model.
intentionalDiffs.plan: Restore spy and annexation layers in later sprints.
